name: already_locked_persists_through_reset
description: currently_breakeven_locked=True AND current_return drops below threshold (ticks reset to 0). The latching invariant: lock MUST stay True. Producer code never resets breakeven_locked to False.
derivation: dynamic_activation = 1.5. threshold = 1.3. current_return (-1.5) < 1.3 -> ticks RESET to 0. currently_breakeven_locked=True -> new_breakeven_locked = True OR (0 >= 5) = True OR False = True (LATCHED). Locked AND base_stop_level (-2.0) < 0 -> stop_trigger_level = max(-2.0, 0.0) = 0.0. CRITICAL LATCHING TEST: catches an impl that recomputes lock from ticks alone (would unlock).
